tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Setup & Configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Initialize Next.js 14 project with Supabase, Tailwind, TypeScript.

**Files:** package.json, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts, src/app/layout.tsx, src/types/index.ts

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "src/types/index.ts", "src/app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev starts on localhost:3000", "Tailwind CSS works", "TypeScript compiles"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Supabase Configuration & Database Schema
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set up Supabase client utilities and database schema with RLS.

**Files:** src/lib/supabase/client.ts, src/lib/supabase/server.ts, src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts, middleware.ts, supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/supabase/client.ts", "src/lib/supabase/server.ts", "middleware.ts", "supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Supabase clients connect", "SQL migration creates tables with RLS"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Colorimetry Data — Seasons, Quiz Scoring, Combinations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define 12 season palettes, quiz scoring algorithm, color combination engine, hair recalculation.

**Files:** src/lib/colorimetry/seasons.ts, src/lib/colorimetry/quiz-scoring.ts, src/lib/colorimetry/color-combinations.ts, src/lib/colorimetry/hair-recalculation.ts

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/colorimetry/seasons.ts", "src/lib/colorimetry/quiz-scoring.ts", "src/lib/colorimetry/color-combinations.ts", "src/lib/colorimetry/hair-recalculation.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["12 seasons defined with palettes", "Quiz scoring returns season for any valid input", "Color combinations return 3 suggestions", "Hair recalculation works"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Auth Pages — Landing, Login, Signup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create landing page, login/signup pages, navbar, auth guard.

**Files:** src/app/page.tsx, src/app/login/page.tsx, src/app/signup/page.tsx, src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx, src/components/layout/AuthGuard.tsx, src/app/layout.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/page.tsx", "src/app/login/page.tsx", "src/app/signup/page.tsx", "src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx", "src/components/layout/AuthGuard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Landing page renders with hero and CTA", "Login authenticates via Supabase", "Signup creates account", "Navbar shows on all pages"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Colorimetry Quiz
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build multi-step quiz that determines user's color season.

**Files:** src/app/quiz/page.tsx, src/components/quiz/QuizStep.tsx, src/components/quiz/QuizProgress.tsx, src/app/result/page.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/quiz/page.tsx", "src/components/quiz/QuizStep.tsx", "src/components/quiz/QuizProgress.tsx", "src/app/result/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5-step quiz renders one question per screen", "Result saved to Supabase", "Result page shows season and palette"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Interactive Avatar Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build interactive avatar with clickable zones, color picker, outfit suggestions, hair recalculation.

**Files:** src/app/avatar/page.tsx, src/components/avatar/AvatarSvg.tsx, src/components/avatar/AvatarZone.tsx, src/components/avatar/ColorPicker.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/avatar/page.tsx", "src/components/avatar/AvatarSvg.tsx", "src/components/avatar/AvatarZone.tsx", "src/components/avatar/ColorPicker.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Avatar renders with 4 clickable zones", "Colors update in real-time", "Suggestions update dynamically", "Hair change triggers season recalculation", "Save outfit stores to Supabase"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wardrobe Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build wardrobe page with saved outfits, favorites, and delete.

**Files:** src/app/wardrobe/page.tsx, src/components/wardrobe/OutfitCard.tsx, src/components/wardrobe/OutfitGrid.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/wardrobe/page.tsx", "src/components/wardrobe/OutfitCard.tsx", "src/components/wardrobe/OutfitGrid.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Lists saved outfits as mini-avatars", "Toggle favorite works", "Delete outfit works", "Empty state when no outfits"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Photo Analysis Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build photo upload page for season refinement via Canvas API color extraction.

**Files:** src/app/quiz/photo/page.tsx, src/components/quiz/PhotoAnalyzer.tsx, src/lib/colorimetry/photo-analysis.ts

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/quiz/photo/page.tsx", "src/components/quiz/PhotoAnalyzer.tsx", "src/lib/colorimetry/photo-analysis.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Photo upload works", "Canvas API extracts colors", "Season refinement runs", "Result shows confirmed or adjusted season"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Guide / Education Pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build educational guide with 5 articles about colorimetry.

**Files:** src/lib/guide/articles.ts, src/app/guide/page.tsx, src/app/guide/[slug]/page.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/guide/articles.ts", "src/app/guide/page.tsx", "src/app/guide/[slug]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Guide index lists 5 articles", "Individual articles render", "Pages accessible without auth"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Final Polish & Build Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Final build verification, responsive testing, cleanup.

**Verify:** npm run build && npm run start — test all routes

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Build succeeds with zero errors", "All pages render correctly", "Mobile layout works", "Desktop layout works"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
